content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 20, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 20 focused on advancing the Eliza Cloud architecture, specifically transitioning agent lifecycle operations to a job queue system and implementing a robust OWNER+AGENT role-based connector registry. Significant progress was made in stabilizing cloud E2E testing, refining the elizaOS live demo, and promoting the v2.0.2 release.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Lifecycle Management**
*   Migrated all agent lifecycle operations (suspend, restart, snapshot, logs) to a job queue, decoupling workers from core services ([#7810](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7810)).
*   Refactored managed services to enqueue jobs instead of performing inline shutdowns ([#7815](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7815), [#7816](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7816)).
*   Stabilized cloud E2E mock stacks and improved frontend toast tracking for async job IDs ([#7813](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7813), [#7824](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7824), [#7825](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7825)).

**Connector Registry & Role-Based Access**
*   Introduced a dual-identity schema (OWNER vs. AGENT) to the connector registry, allowing independent platform account management ([#7817](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7817)).
*   Updated UI components to support role-aware account lists and dual-section setup panels ([#7819](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7819)).
*   Enabled end-to-end OWNER+AGENT role support for X (Twitter) via Eliza Cloud OAuth ([#7851](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7851)).

**System Hardening & Release Readiness**
*   Promoted `develop` to `main` for v2.0.2, including critical fixes for desktop release inputs and mobile build stability ([#7828](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7828), [#7840](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7840)).
*   Polished the elizaOS live demo and USB-installer workflows, hardening installation and CI validation ([#7803](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7803)).
*   Improved chat reply grounding and evaluator prose recovery to prevent internal planning notes from appearing in user-facing responses ([#7821](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7821), [#7827](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7827)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Plugin & Feature Expansion:** [#7869](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7869) (Soul Personality plugin), [#7868](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7868) (Slack OWNER+AGENT), [#7852](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7852) (Google OWNER+AGENT), [#7850](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7850) (Mobile voice/sandbox routing).
*   **Infrastructure & CI:** [#7873](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7873) (RISC-V classification), [#7871](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7871) (USB persistence), [#7853](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7853) (Migration fail-fast).
*   **Dependency Updates:** Multiple PRs ([#7865](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7865) through [#7861](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7861)) bumping core dependencies including Tailwind, Marked, and various GitHub Actions.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were explicitly marked as closed in the provided data.*

## NEW ISSUES
**Benchmark & Release Orchestration**
*   [#7836](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7836): Hyperliquid live harness runs are currently blocked due to demo-mode output rejection.
*   [#7837](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7837): Release orchestration workflows are failing at startup due to missing platform-signing secrets.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were provided in the activity data.*
